topic_angle: 학사경고 받던 내가 AI 5개 활용해서 A+ 받은 5가지 비결
essence_5: 각 AI(Gemini/ChatGPT/Claude/NotebookLM)에 지침으로 나·과제·전공 컨텍스트 학습시키고 모든 질문·과제에 활용
수업 중 Gemini Live로 강의 실시간 받아쓰기 — 9시 1교시 졸려도 시험기간 백지 안 됨
시험 D-3 NotebookLM으로 족보 없이 객관식 20 + 서술형 5 예상문제 자동 생성
리포트 초안 Claude Project로 내 글 스타일 학습 → 교수 시각 첨삭 시뮬레이션 2회 반복
과제 마감 직전 NotebookLM에 강의자료 25개 박고 핵심 요약 + 인용 출처 자동 생성
rationale: recent에 portrait/landscape/movie_poster·다크블루/형광옐로우 다 소진 → interface_capture로 톤 전환. 학생·AI 활용 토픽이라 실제 도구 UI(NotebookLM/Claude/Gemini) 캡처가 메시지 1대1 매핑에 최적. accent #FFB800 따뜻한 골드는 nene 자연광 톤과 정합하며 recent 5장 중복 0.

slides.headline: 학사경고에서 올A+까지 — AI 5개로 한 학기 반등
slides.label: AI 활용·복학생 기록
slides.prompt:
Slide 1 message: "학사경고에서 A+까지 — AI 5개로 한 학기 반등" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생이 평범한 카페 책상 위에 노트북·아이패드·아이폰을 자연스럽게 펼쳐놓고 4~5개의 AI 도구 화면(Gemini, Claude, NotebookLM, ChatGPT)이 살짝씩 보이는 candid 책상 오버헤드 샷 — 도구 5개가 곧 5가지 비결의 시각 약속.

Korean university cafe table top-down candid shot. A worn 13-inch MacBook in the center showing a Claude conversation interface in soft focus, an iPad next to it showing NotebookLM source panel with Korean lecture notes, an iPhone leaning against a small ceramic mug showing Gemini app open. Around the devices: a slightly creased printed syllabus in Korean, a yellow highlighter pen, half-eaten croissant on a napkin, a paper coffee cup with Korean cafe logo lightly blurred, scattered handwritten notes with Korean shorthand. Wooden cafe table grain visible. Afternoon light from the side window hitting the upper-left of the frame naturally.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld overhead framing from student's POV · everyday Korean cafe scene · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: natural afternoon daylight from window (upper-left), warm-cool mixed, no flash, slight shadow under devices
- camera angle: 80° overhead top-down, slight 5° tilt for candid feel
- composition: rule of thirds, MacBook anchoring center-left, devices radiating diagonally, leading lines from table edge
- mood: relatable-grounded, '나도 따라 해볼 수 있겠다' recognition

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (highlighter and morning glow), neutral cream #F5F0E8 (paper/napkin), deep charcoal #1F1F1F (text box background), muted slate #475569 (device bezels).

Display large hangul text "학사경고에서 올A+까지" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering lower 55% of frame, dark charcoal text. Below in slightly smaller weight: "AI 5개로 한 학기 반등". Small label box upper-left with "AI 활용·복학생 기록". Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy — especially 학사경고, 올, 한 학기.

Texture details: real wood grain on table, slight paper crinkle, device screens with natural reflection (not glossy CGI), realistic crumbs on napkin, ballpoint pen ink slightly bled into paper.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px square (handle slot). keep bottom 80px clean (dot indicator strip). text box dominant in lower half, devices/props in upper half. avoid centered everything.

No text other than the hangul lines specified. No external account handles like @ainow or @nene. No AI tool logos beyond legitimate UI shown on screens. No floating UI cards outside devices. No glow effects.

slides.headline: AI마다 나·과제·전공 먼저 학습시키기
slides.label: 비결 1 · 컨텍스트 세팅
slides.prompt:
Slide 2 message: "각 AI에 지침으로 나·과제·전공 컨텍스트 먼저 학습시키기" → visual metaphor: 노트북 화면에 ChatGPT 또는 Claude의 Custom Instructions / Project 설정 화면이 클로즈업으로 떠 있고, 한국 대학생의 손이 키보드 위에서 한글 지침을 입력 중인 candid 화면 캡처.

Korean student's hands hovering over MacBook keyboard, screen showing a Custom Instructions / Project settings panel of an AI chat tool (generic-but-recognizable layout — text input field labeled '지침' in Korean with handwritten-style filled content like '저는 통계학 전공 3학년이고...', '과제는 주로 R로...'). Behind the laptop: a worn Korean university textbook (statistics or similar) lying open, a yellow Post-it with handwritten Korean note '나부터 먼저 알려주기'. Desk surface is a plain wood study desk in a small Korean apartment study room. Window light from the right side, warm afternoon tone.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing from over-the-shoulder · everyday Korean home study desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: afternoon natural daylight from window-right (40° elevation), soft warm fill, slight shadow on left side of keyboard
- camera angle: over-the-shoulder, 30° downward, eye-level toward laptop screen
- composition: rule of thirds (screen center-right intersection, hand left third), leading lines from keyboard to screen text
- mood: focused-deliberate, '준비하는 느낌'

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (Post-it and screen highlight), white screen background #FAFAFA, dark text #1F1F1F, muted slate #475569 (keyboard).

Display large hangul text "AI마다 나를 먼저 학습시키기" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 35% of frame, dark text. Below in smaller weight: "지침으로 컨텍스트 세팅하면 답이 달라져요". Small label box upper-left '비결 1 · 컨텍스트 세팅'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: real keyboard key wear, screen has slight natural reflection, Post-it adhesive slight curl at corner, textbook page slight yellowing, hand skin natural (not airbrushed).

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 35%, scene lower 65%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul lines specified. No external account handles. No tool logos beyond legitimate UI on screen. No floating cards. No glow.

slides.headline: 9시 1교시 졸려도 시험기간 백지 안 되는 법
slides.label: 비결 2 · 강의 받아쓰기
slides.prompt:
Slide 3 message: "수업 중 Gemini Live로 강의 실시간 받아쓰기 — 9시 1교시 졸려도 시험기간 백지 안 됨" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 강의실 책상 candid 샷 — 종이 노트는 펴져 있지만 글씨가 조금밖에 없고, 옆 스마트폰이 비스듬히 세워져 Gemini Live 음성 인식 화면에 한국어 transcript가 실시간 흘러가는 모습.

Korean university lecture hall first-person POV. Foreground: a paper notebook open on a wooden lecture desk with sparse handwritten Korean fragments (just a few keywords like '회귀분석', '잔차'), a black ballpoint pen resting beside it. To the right, a smartphone propped at slight angle on a small stand, screen displaying Gemini Live transcription interface mid-listening — animated waveform visible, Korean text scrolling in real time (sample text like '오늘은 회귀분석의 가정에 대해...'). Student's left hand visible from wrist only (no face), fingers loosely curled around pen. Background slightly out of focus: rows of empty lecture chairs in beige tones, large window on left with morning daylight, dim fluorescent ceiling reflection.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight (9 AM warm-cool mixed) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing from student's seated POV · everyday Korean university lecture hall · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: morning natural daylight from window-left (35° elevation), warm-cool mix with cool fluorescent ambient fill, no flash
- camera angle: eye-level seated POV, slight 15° downward tilt
- composition: rule of thirds (notebook lower-left intersection, phone right-third), leading lines from desk edge to background chairs
- mood: relatable-quiet, '이게 나야 — 1교시 졸려도 살아남는 법' recognition

Color palette: muted wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (morning highlight on phone screen edge), cool gray #94A3B8 (background chairs in soft focus), deep charcoal #1F1F1F (text box).

Display large hangul text "9시 1교시 졸려도" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 45% of frame, dark text. Below in smaller weight: "Gemini Live로 강의 받아쓰기". Small label box upper-left '비결 2 · 강의 받아쓰기'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper notebook fiber visible, smartphone screen natural slight reflection (not CGI glossy), wood grain on desk, faint dust motes in morning light. Smartphone bezel looks like real device, not generic mockup.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 45%, scene lower 55%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul specified. No external handles. No tool logos beyond legitimate Gemini Live UI on phone. No floating cards. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 족보 없을 때 NotebookLM이 예상문제 만드는 법
slides.label: 비결 3 · 시험 D-3
slides.prompt:
Slide 4 message: "시험 D-3 NotebookLM으로 족보 없이 객관식 20 + 서술형 5 예상문제 자동 생성" → visual metaphor: 좁은 한국 대학생 자취방 책상에 노트북 화면이 NotebookLM 인터페이스 — 좌측 강의자료 source 패널에 한글 PDF 여러 개가 업로드된 상태, 우측 chat 패널에 '객관식 20문제 + 서술형 5문제 만들어줘' 한글 prompt와 생성된 예상문제 목록이 보이는 화면 캡처.

Korean student studio room desk close-up. MacBook screen dominant in frame showing NotebookLM-style interface: left panel labeled '소스' with a vertical list of 12+ Korean PDF filenames (e.g., '6주차_회귀분석.pdf', '7주차_분산분석.pdf' style), middle chat panel showing a Korean user message '객관식 20개 + 서술형 5개 예상문제 만들어줘 — 6~10주차 기반', and AI response area showing numbered Korean exam questions like '1. 다음 중 단순회귀분석의 가정으로 옳지 않은 것은?' partially visible. Around the laptop: a desk calendar with 'D-3' circled in red marker, a half-empty energy drink can, scattered highlighted printed lecture notes. Small desk lamp warm glow from upper-right.

medium: smartphone candid · natural mixed lighting (desk lamp + faint window evening light) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean studio apartment desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm desk lamp from upper-right (45° elevation), cool fading daylight from background window, mixed temperature
- camera angle: 25° downward toward laptop screen, slightly close-up
- composition: rule of thirds (NotebookLM chat panel right-third, source list left-third), leading lines from desk edge
- mood: urgent-focused, '시험 3일 전 모드'

Color palette: warm desk wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (lamp glow and D-3 marker), cool screen white #FAFAFA, red #DC2626 (D-3 circle accent), dark text #1F1F1F.

Display large hangul text "D-3, 족보 없이 예상문제" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 40% of frame. Below in smaller weight: "NotebookLM으로 자동 생성하기". Small label box upper-left '비결 3 · 시험 D-3'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: desk calendar paper slight curl, energy drink condensation droplets, highlighter ink slightly bled on printed notes, screen with natural reflection.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 40%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul specified. No external handles. No tool logos beyond legitimate NotebookLM UI. No floating cards outside screen. No glow.

slides.headline: 리포트 초안 Claude Project로 첨삭하기
slides.subtext: 내 글 스타일 학습 → 교수 시각 첨삭
slides.label: 비결 4 · 리포트 첨삭
slides.prompt:
Slide 5 message: "리포트 초안 Claude Project로 내 글 스타일 학습 → 교수 시각 첨삭 시뮬레이션 2회 반복" → visual metaphor: 노트북 옆에 인쇄된 리포트 종이 한 부가 빨간 펜으로 동그라미·밑줄 자국 가득, 화면에는 Claude Project 인터페이스가 보이며 '교수님 시각으로 첨삭해줘' 한글 prompt와 응답이 보이는 candid 책상 샷.

Korean home desk side angle. MacBook half-open showing Claude-style chat interface (orange accent recognizable but not branded): left sidebar showing a Project labeled '내 리포트 스타일 학습', main chat showing a Korean user message '이 초안을 교수 시각으로 첨삭해줘 — 논리 구조 위주' and assistant response with bullet-point Korean feedback like '도입부 논제 명확하지 않음', '3문단 인용 출처 누락'. On the desk next to laptop: a printed A4 report draft in Korean (visible title '회귀분석 응용 사례' or similar), red pen markings — circles, underlines, margin notes in Korean handwriting like '논리 약함'. A coffee mug with subtle steam, a small Post-it stack.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight from side window · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing 3/4 angle · everyday Korean apartment desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: afternoon natural daylight from window-left (30° elevation), soft warm fill on desk surface
- camera angle: 3/4 side angle, 20° downward, eye-level toward desk
- composition: rule of thirds (printed report center-right intersection, laptop screen left-third), leading lines from red pen to laptop
- mood: deliberate-iterative, '두 번째 패스 돌리는 중'

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (sunlight highlight), Anthropic-feel orange tone on Claude UI #D97757 (subtle, on screen only), red pen #DC2626 (markings), dark text #1F1F1F.

Display large hangul text "교수 시각으로 첨삭 — 2회 반복" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 40% of frame. Below smaller weight: "Claude Project가 내 글 스타일 학습". Small label box upper-left '비결 4 · 리포트 첨삭'. Small gray sub-CTA bottom edge: '저장해두면 다음 과제에 도움'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: paper fiber visible on printed report, red ink slight bleed and texture, pen tip on paper, coffee steam wisps natural, laptop screen natural slight reflection.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 40%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul specified. No external account handles. No tool logos beyond legitimate Claude UI on screen. No floating cards. No glow.

slides.headline: 강의자료 25개 박고 핵심 요약·인용 자동 뽑기
slides.label: 비결 5 · 마감 직전
slides.prompt:
Slide 6 message: "과제 마감 직전 NotebookLM에 강의자료 25개 박고 핵심 요약 + 인용 출처 자동 생성" → visual metaphor: 늦은 밤 노트북 화면이 NotebookLM 소스 패널에 PDF 25개가 빽빽이 리스트업된 상태, 우측 응답 영역에 한글 요약과 각주 형태의 출처 인용이 줄줄이 표시된 candid 화면 캡처. 책상에는 닫힌 두꺼운 책들 쌓여 있음.

Korean student late-night desk close-up. MacBook screen filled with NotebookLM-style interface: left panel '소스' showing a dense scrollable list of 25 Korean lecture PDF filenames (titles like '1주차_서론.pdf', '2주차_연구방법론.pdf', ... '15주차_결론.pdf' truncated visually), middle response panel showing a Korean prompt '15주차까지 핵심 요약 + 인용 출처 정리해줘' and a long structured response with bullet summaries and bracketed citations like '[3주차_표본추출.pdf]', '[7주차_분산분석.pdf]'. Around the laptop: a stack of 4~5 thick Korean textbooks (slightly worn covers), an empty paper coffee cup, a small desk clock showing 02:47, faint window reflection of Seoul apartment building lights at night.

medium: smartphone candid · late-night low light (desk lamp warm + screen cool glow) · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing · everyday Korean studio apartment late-night desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality. Slight ISO grain acceptable (night phone capture realism).

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm desk lamp from right (50° elevation) as key, cool screen glow as fill on laptop area, dark ambient around edges
- camera angle: 30° downward over laptop, slight close-up on screen
- composition: rule of thirds (NotebookLM response right-third, source list left-third), books stacked as foreground bottom-left anchor
- mood: deadline-grit, '마감 직전 살아남기'

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (lamp warm glow), cool screen blue-white #E5E7EB, deep night charcoal #0F172A (background), dark text #1F1F1F.

Display large hangul text "강의자료 25개 → 요약 + 인용" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 40% of frame. Below smaller weight: "마감 직전 NotebookLM으로 자동 정리". Small label box upper-left '비결 5 · 마감 직전'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: textbook cover wear, paper coffee cup slight crumple, desk clock face natural reflection, screen with natural slight glare, faint night dust in lamp light.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 40%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul specified. No external handles. No tool logos beyond legitimate NotebookLM UI. No floating cards. No glow effects.

slides.headline: 한 학기 F 2개에서 전공 4과목 A+로 바뀜
slides.label: 실증 · 성적표 캡처
slides.prompt:
Slide 7 message: "학사경고 직전 F 2개 받던 학기에서 다음 학기 전공 4과목 A+로 반등 — 도구 5개의 실증 결과" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학교 학생 포털 성적조회 화면 캡처가 노트북 화면에 떠 있고, 표 형식으로 과목명·학점·성적 컬럼에 A+, A+, A+, A+, A가 줄지어 있는 candid 책상 샷. 옆에 종이로 인쇄해둔 이전 학기 성적표(F가 보이는)가 살짝 겹쳐서 비교 가능한 구성.

Korean university student portal grade-check screen captured on a MacBook display. Screen shows a typical Korean university grade table interface with columns labeled '과목명', '학점', '성적', and rows showing entries like: '회귀분석 / 3 / A+', '수리통계학 / 3 / A+', '계량경제 / 3 / A+', '데이터마이닝 / 3 / A+', '교양영어 / 2 / A'. Header text visible '2025-2학기 성적조회'. The table is clean and readable, not stylized. On the desk beside the laptop: a printed previous semester transcript (slightly creased, partially overlapping under the laptop edge) showing visible F or D grades — the 'before' visual reference. A small Post-it with handwritten Korean '5개 도구 진짜 효과 있었음'.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight from window · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing 3/4 angle · everyday Korean home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: afternoon natural daylight from window-right (40° elevation), warm soft fill, slight desk shadow
- camera angle: 25° downward toward laptop screen, 3/4 side angle
- composition: rule of thirds (grade table center, printed transcript lower-left third), leading lines from old transcript edge to laptop screen — before/after visual flow
- mood: quiet-proud, '실측 증거'

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (Post-it and highlighter), portal blue header #2563EB (subtle, on screen only), white screen #FAFAFA, dark text #1F1F1F.

Display large hangul text "F 2개에서 A+ 4과목으로" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 35% of frame. Below smaller weight: "한 학기 만에 도구 5개로 반등". Small label box upper-left '실증 · 성적표 캡처'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: printed transcript paper slight yellow tint and crease, Post-it adhesive corner curl, screen with natural reflection (not glossy CGI), grade table sharp text legible.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 35%. avoid centered everything.

No text other than hangul and the grade table content specified. No external handles. No university name or logo visible. No floating cards. No glow.

slides.headline: 다음 시험엔 너도 이 5개 그대로 써봐
slides.label: 저장·공유·팔로우
slides.prompt:
Slide 8 message: "이 5개 그대로 따라하면 너도 가능 — 팔로우·저장·DM으로 챙겨가" → visual metaphor: 한국 대학생의 손이 스마트폰을 들고 있고 화면에 Instagram 게시물 인터페이스가 살짝 보이며, 그 위에 팔로우 버튼 mockup · 저장 북마크 아이콘 · DM 화살표 아이콘 3종이 시각적으로 배치된 candid 손 클로즈업. 책상 위 노트북은 살짝 닫혀 있고 평화로운 작업 종료 분위기.

Korean student hand holding an iPhone vertically (no face visible, just hand from wrist), screen showing a simulated Instagram post bottom bar with bookmark/save icon and a custom Korean follow button. Around the phone on a wooden desk: a half-closed MacBook (suggesting work done), a cup of warm tea with subtle steam, a small notebook with a Korean handwritten note '시험 끝나면 다시 펴보기'. Window soft daylight from upper-right giving the scene a warm settled tone.

Key UI mockup elements visible in composition (each rendered as recognizable Instagram-style elements):
- A blue rounded rectangle button with white Korean text "팔로우" — placed mid-right of frame as a clear CTA mockup
- A bookmark icon (outline style, recognizable Instagram save bookmark shape) — placed beside the follow button
- A paper-airplane DM/share arrow icon — placed beside the bookmark
These three icons appear as a small clustered cluster, clearly visible, indicating the three actions (follow + save + DM) at a glance.

medium: smartphone candid · natural daylight · iPhone 15 default rendering · low-key handheld framing close-up on hand and phone · everyday Korean home desk · NOT studio lighting · NOT cinematic glow · NOT halation · NOT neon · NOT editorial fashion · NOT movie poster artificiality.

Cinematic spec:
- lighting: warm afternoon natural daylight from window upper-right (35° elevation), soft warm fill on hand and phone
- camera angle: eye-level toward phone screen, 20° from front
- composition: rule of thirds (phone center, CTA icon cluster right-third), leading lines from hand wrist to phone screen
- mood: warm-inviting, '같이 해보자' tone

Color palette: warm wood #C8A47C, accent #FFB800 (window light), Instagram-feel blue #3897F0 (subtle follow button), neutral cream #F5F0E8, dark text #1F1F1F.

Display large hangul text "다음 시험엔 너도 써봐" with bold sans-serif typography (Pretendard Black weight feeling) inside a cream-white rounded text box covering upper 40% of frame, dark text. Below in smaller weight: "팔로우·저장하고 시험기간에 펴보자". Small label box upper-left '저장·공유·팔로우'. Hangul rendered with perfect 받침·자모 accuracy.

Texture details: hand skin natural (not airbrushed), phone bezel realistic, tea steam wisps natural, notebook paper fiber visible, slight finger smudge on phone screen edge.

Composition rules: keep upper-right corner clean ~120px (handle slot). keep bottom 80px clean (dots). text box upper 40%, hand+phone+CTA icons in lower-mid. avoid centered everything. all three CTA icons (follow button, bookmark, DM arrow) must be visibly rendered, not text-only.

No text other than hangul lines and the '팔로우' button text specified. No external account handles. No real account names. No floating cards beyond the three CTA icon cluster. No glow effects.
